nasb.text: O Lord, what is man, that You take knowledge of him? Or the son of man, that You think of him?

esv.text: O Lord, what is man that you regard him, or the son of man that you think of him?

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！人算甚麼，你竟關懷他， 世人算甚麼，你竟眷念他。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 人算什么，你竟顾念他？ 世人算什么，你竟眷顾他？

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，人算什么，你竟认识他！ 世人算什么，你竟顾惜他！
